top3.sql:
SELECT T.team_long_name
FROM Match M
JOIN Team T ON M.away_team_api_id = T.team_api_id
JOIN League L ON M.league_id = L.id
WHERE L.name = 'Scotland Premier League' AND M.season = '2010' AND M.away_team_goal > M.home_team_goal
GROUP BY T.team_long_name
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T.team_long_name
FROM Match M
JOIN Team T ON M.away_team_api_id = T.team_api_id
JOIN League L ON M.league_id = L.id
WHERE L.name = 'Scotland Premier League' AND M.season = '2010' AND M.away_team_goal > M.home_team_goal
GROUP BY T.team_long_name
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T.team_long_name
FROM Match M
JOIN Team T ON M.away_team_api_id = T.team_api_id
JOIN League L ON M.league_id = L.id
WHERE L.name = 'Scotland Premier League' AND M.season = '2010' AND M.away_team_goal > M.home_team_goal
GROUP BY T.team_long_name
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH AwayWins AS (
    SELECT T.team_long_name, COUNT(*) AS win_count
    FROM Match M
    JOIN Team T ON M.away_team_api_id = T.team_api_id
    JOIN League L ON M.league_id = L.id
    WHERE L.name = 'Scotland Premier League' 
      AND M.season = '2010' 
      AND M.away_team_goal > M.home_team_goal
    GROUP BY T.team_long_name
)
SELECT team_long_name
FROM AwayWins
ORDER BY win_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
SELECT T.team_long_name
FROM Match M
JOIN Team T ON M.away_team_api_id = T.team_api_id
JOIN League L ON M.league_id = L.id
WHERE L.name = 'Scotland Premier League' AND M.season = '2010' AND M.away_team_goal > M.home_team_goal
GROUP BY T.team_long_name
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;
